## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the website migration and review the PSEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Migration Decision:** Implement a two-phase migration: first, update the homepage and docs canonicals to `anything.com` to consolidate authority; second, execute a full 301 redirect at the DNS level later.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**PSEO Strategy:** Launch a Programmatic SEO (PSEO) initiative, starting with a 50–100 page MVP to test the model before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [**New Attribution Tool:** GrowthX now has access to Dubb, a short-link tool providing directional revenue attribution for content to guide prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Communication:** Dhruv will be more responsive on Slack for rapid decisions to accelerate execution.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The three-domain setup (`create-anything.com`, `create-xyz.com`, `anything.com`) is splitting SEO authority, causing traffic headwinds.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
      - [Non-brand homepage traffic is flat or down 10% over six months.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Solution:** A two-phase migration was agreed upon.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
    1.  **Phase 1 (Immediate):** Update canonical tags on the homepage and docs to point to `anything.com`.
          - [**Rationale:** This is the safest, lowest-risk first step to consolidate authority.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
    2.  **Phase 2 (Later):** Execute a full 301 redirect at the DNS level.
          - [**Rationale:** This "rip the band-aid off" approach is expected to cause a temporary traffic dip (4–6 weeks) but drive higher aggregate growth over 3–6 months.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Programmatic SEO (PSEO) Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Build a scalable content engine for long-tail keywords around app development.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will build templated pages, focusing on user experience to avoid thin content.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [**Structure:** Use hub pages for verticals (e.g., healthcare) and tags for apps to create a semantic web without deep folder nesting.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [**Idea:** Dhruv proposed a "mobile app builder" play.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Google Ads for this category show higher conversions and lower CPCs than "web app builder."](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Concept:** Create pages for top App Store apps with teardowns and a "one-click build" prompt for Anything.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [**Rollout:** Launch a 50–100 page MVP to test indexing and query performance before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [**Potential:** Estimated traffic gain of 50–70k monthly visitors, with long-term potential for 2x+ growth.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)

### Content Attribution with Dubb

  - [**Tool:** GrowthX has access to Dubb for short-link attribution tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Functionality:** Tracks downstream metrics (views, leads, signups, sales) to provide directional revenue signals for content.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**Limitation:** Relies on last-touch attribution and cookies, so data is directional, not definitive.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Benefit:** Enables faster prioritization by linking content performance to revenue, not just traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dhruv:**](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)

      - [Increase Slack responsiveness for rapid decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=2028.0)
  - [**Kyle:**](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
      - [Research search volume for the "mobile app builder" PSEO concept.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [Scope the PSEO project with the GrowthX engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
      - [Provide a timeline and cost estimate for the PSEO MVP.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [Explore Dubb for content revenue attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/e3g-An-XmGWYY1NijWdxpsnEnEkbD14r?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
